prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年约第125名，近年排名略有波动（2021年第124→2025年第131→2026年第125），整体处于中游211水平；声誉文件中未见辽宁大学相关负面舆情信号；抖音热度排名第105、评价"一般"，短视频平台曝光量较低，报考关注度相对平稳；未见明显投档断档记录；第五轮学科评估中应用经济学获评A-，为该校唯一A-及以上学科，与理科招生的数字经济等专业关联密切，对相关专业报考有一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业社会热度高热推荐，与该校理科招生的电子信息类、测控技术与仪器、微电子科学与工程等专业方向一致，有利于提升相关专业报考热度；内蒙古2026年高考报名总数约154000人，较2025年（历史类+物理类约116360人）增长约32.3%，考生规模大幅增加，竞争显著加剧；辽宁大学位于辽宁省沈阳市，与内蒙古自治区相邻，地域接近性较强，对内蒙古考生有一定吸引力；该校在内蒙古招生规模较小（理科10人），属于跨省招生中的中等偏下规模。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次近两年持续前移趋势、2026年招生计划与2025年持平、内蒙古考生总数大幅增长约32%导致竞争加剧、电子信息类等热门专业社会热度高企等因素，在2025年基准9395名基础上预计竞争进一步加剧，位次继续前移；预测最低位次约9160名，区间8660–9660名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science (physics category) was approximately 18045 → 10250 → 17058 → 12627 → 9395, showing significant fluctuations overall. In 2022, it advanced sharply to 10250, then retreated to 17058 in 2023, advanced again to 12627 in 2024, and further advanced to 9395 in 2025. In the past two years, it has shown a continuous advancing trend, with a baseline of approximately 9395 in 2025. The provincial science (physics category) enrollment plan was 15 in 2021, 17 in 2022, 17 in 2023, 15 in 2024, and 10 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 10, with a significant reduction of about 33% in 2025 compared to 2024, and 2026 remains the same as 2025. The reduction effect has already been reflected in the 2025 ranking.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; Soft Science China University Ranking 2026 approximately 125th, with slight fluctuations in recent years (124th in 2021 → 131st in 2025 → 125th in 2026), overall at a mid-tier 211 level. No negative public opinion signals related to Liaoning University were found in reputation documents. Douyin popularity ranking 105th, rated as "average," with relatively low exposure on short video platforms and stable application attention. No obvious record of enrollment gaps. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Applied Economics was rated A-, the only A- or above discipline at the university, closely related to the Digital Economy major in science enrollment, which has a certain appeal for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation are highly recommended in social popularity, consistent with the university's science enrollment majors like Electronic Information, Measurement and Control Technology and Instruments, and Microelectronics Science and Engineering, which helps boost application enthusiasm for related majors. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Inner Mongolia college entrance examination is approximately 154,000, an increase of about 32.3% compared to 2025 (history category + physics category approximately 116,360), with a significant increase in candidate scale and intensified competition. Liaoning University is located in Shenyang City, Liaoning Province, adjacent to Inner Mongolia Autonomous Region, with strong geographical proximity, which has a certain appeal to Inner Mongolia candidates. The university's enrollment scale in Inner Mongolia is small (10 in science), belonging to a medium-to-small scale among cross-provincial enrollments.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous advancing trend of historical rankings in the past two years, the 2026 enrollment plan remaining the same as 2025, the significant increase of about 32% in the total number of Inner Mongolia candidates leading to intensified competition, and the high social popularity of hot majors like Electronic Information, it is expected that competition will further intensify based on the 2025 baseline of 9395, with rankings continuing to advance. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 9160, with a range of 8660–9660.

Note that majors such as Inorganic Non-metallic Materials Engineering, Chemistry, and Environmental Ecological Engineering have relatively low social popularity, and application competition is relatively mild.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for liberal arts (history category) was approximately 1582 → 1303 → 4471 → 1769 → 1613. In 2023, there was an abnormal large shift to 4471, but it quickly recovered to 1769 in 2024 and further advanced to 1613 in 2025. Excluding the 2023 anomaly, the overall fluctuation range is 1300–1800, with a 2025 baseline of about 1613. The provincial liberal arts (history category) enrollment plan was 7 students from 2021 to 2024, sharply reduced to 4 in 2025, and remains at 4 in 2026. The 2025 reduction is about 43%, and the 2026 plan is flat compared to 2025. The reduction effect has been partially reflected in the 2025 ranking.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 125th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with stable rankings in recent years, belonging to the mid-tier 211 level. No negative reputation signals related to Liaoning University were found in reputation documents. Douyin popularity ranking is 105th, with an evaluation of "average," indicating stable application attention. No records of enrollment gaps were found. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Applied Economics was rated A-, directly related to the liberal arts enrollment majors such as Economics and International Economics and Trade, which strongly attracts liberal arts candidates applying for economics-related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Chinese Language/Literature majors are socially recommended, Law is in a wait-and-see phase, and Accounting/Finance/Auditing are recommended. These match the university's liberal arts enrollment majors such as Chinese Language and Literature, Economics, International Economics and Trade, and English, with overall positive major popularity. In 2026, the total number of Inner Mongolia college entrance exam registrants is about 154,000, an increase of about 32.3% compared to 2025. The number of history category candidates is expected to grow synchronously, intensifying competition. Liaoning University is located in Shenyang, adjacent to Inner Mongolia, with good regional proximity. The university's liberal arts enrollment in Inner Mongolia is extremely small (only 4 students), and scarcity may drive up competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the historical ranking fluctuation range of 1300–1800, the 2026 enrollment plan flat compared to 2025, a significant increase of about 32% in Inner Mongolia candidates leading to intensified competition, and the strong appeal of the A- Applied Economics discipline for liberal arts economics majors, competition is expected to slightly intensify based on the 2025 baseline of 1613, with a slight forward shift in ranking. The predicted minimum ranking is about 1573, with a range of 1180–1966.
